mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_groups t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.name},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.p_id = #{kbGroupsEntity.pId}
order by sort desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_groups t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.id},'%')
AND t.name like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.name},'%')
AND t.sort like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.sort},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.status},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbGroupsEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.p_id = #{kbGroupsEntity.pId}
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_groups t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}

select * from kb_groups where p_id = #{id}
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}
select count(1) from kb_groups where p_id = #{id}
